remedy.notes: Complaint (Doc 1, 54 pp) pulled from RECAP and verified 2026-06-01. Copyright + Lanham (trademark/false-attribution) claims; part of a multi-publisher wave against Perplexity (NYT, Chicago Tribune, Encyclopaedia Britannica/Merriam-Webster, Reddit, Dow Jones).
